name: Astro - Dandy's World
description:
He remembers it for you

"I remember it, despite how much I don't want to."

Lowkey this is mostly inspired by @frailanimator on YouTube!

There is like one personal head canon (I think, I dunno)

I was gunna make another Christmas bot cuz I'm lacking in those but then I remembered... I can make whatever the I want, I don't have a schedule! I'll make a 2024 Halloween bot if I really wanted to!!! But I do really wanna make more, just lacking ideas :(

Requested -

No.
